package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_multierror_append_for_success_path: Layer: Error handling cost. Flag multi-error aggregators allocated on success-heavy paths before any error exists.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule531PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario531Positive(records []Rule531PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
